title: onopordum illyricum f. delortii
intro: Onopordum illyricum f. delortii, also known as the Illyrian cotton thistle or the Delort's cotton thistle, is a variety of the thistle plant native to the Balkans and parts of Eastern Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been used to treat a range of health issues, including wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Onopordum illyricum f. delortii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and protect against infection, making it a useful herb for treating various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
